headline: Will Dollar General (DG) Lean More Into Grocery And Digital Under New CEO Jerry Fleeman?
summary: Dollar General Corporation has announced that its Board appointed Jerry W. “JJ” Fleeman Jr., former Ahold Delhaize USA CEO, to succeed Todd Vasos as Chief Executive Officer effective January 1, 2027, with Fleeman also expected to join the Board at that time. The planned handover pairs continuity, Vasos remaining as senior advisor and director, with Fleeman’s long experience in grocery, digital commerce, and loyalty programs, potentially reshaping how Dollar General approaches food,...
